# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.11

# Install required dependencies
RUN pip install fastapi uvicorn psycopg2 redis

# Copy application files
COPY . .

# Web server configuration
COPY docker-compose.yaml .
RUN docker-compose up -d web

# API server configuration
COPY docker-compose.yaml .
RUN docker-compose up -d api

# Database configuration
COPY docker-compose.yaml .
RUN docker-compose up -d db

# Redis configuration
COPY docker-compose.yaml .
RUN docker-compose up -d redis

# Expose ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379
